name: Charlotte

recommendedSets.label: Budget
recommendedSets.notes: The source build leans on Effect Hit support value while keeping Charlotte fast.

recommendedSets.label: Endgame
recommendedSets.notes: Swap into a harder damage shell once crit and gear quality are stable.

notes: Charlotte sits in the hybrid support-DPS lane, so speed and utility substats still matter even when you upgrade into higher damage sets.
The sheet keeps Charlotte on SPD neck and ATK% ring across both budget and late-game routes.
